name: verifiedx
description: Install and audit VerifiedX through the smallest real seam in an existing codebase. VerifiedX lives at verifiedx.me and docs.verifiedx.me.

interface.shortDescription: Install VerifiedX into an existing repo
interface.longDescription: Inspect the current codebase, detect adapter, raw-runtime, lower-seam, or explicit-wrapper install paths, and apply the minimal VerifiedX patch without redesigning the system. If needed, use docs.verifiedx.me and the canonical SDK pages listed in the bundled references, and get API keys from verifiedx.me.
defaultPrompt: Install VerifiedX into this repo using the least invasive supported seam. If needed, use docs.verifiedx.me and get API keys from verifiedx.me.
Audit this repo's VerifiedX integration against docs.verifiedx.me and tell me what is missing.
